officialPancakeDocumentation.label: Smart Router (BSC testnet)
officialPancakeDocumentation.note: Pancake developer docs list this address under Smart Router testnet table.

bscScanUrl.note: Valid explorer URL for chain 97; automated HTML fetch returned 403 (bot protection).

onChainContractRole.conclusion: On-chain contract behaves as V3 SwapRouter periphery, not the same family as chain 56 underlying 0xC6665d98Efd81f47B03801187eB46cbC63F328B0 (pancakeswapV2 + IERC20 swap).

wrapperInterfaceCompatibility.conclusion: MelegaSmartRouterWrapper v1 cannot call this contract via IUnderlyingSwapRouter without ABI/interface upgrade.

registryAction.reason: Wrapper-compatible underlying router not verified for chain 97.

comparisonChain56.note: Mainnet Melega execution router uses Pancake Smart Router IERC20 swap surface — different from testnet candidate bytecode.

alternativeTestnetAddresses.v3SwapRouterNote: Also V3 periphery (factory + exactInputSingle); same wrapper incompatibility.
alternativeTestnetAddresses.v2RouterNote: Has swapExactTokensForTokens family but is V2 Router, not Smart Router — requires separate certification.
